Our Story

Born in the Heart of Texas.

Fizi was born in the heart of Texas, founded by five young women who shared a vision: to create a soda that doesn't just taste great, but is made with better ingredients for a better tomorrow.

The drink in your hand represents fresh taste, simple ingredients, and the start to a cleaner future. Fizi. Sip Clean. Stay Pure.

What We Stand For

Three things. That's it.

01
All Natural

No artificial flavors, colors, or sweeteners. What's on the label is what's in the can. Nothing more.

02
Texas Made

Inspired by the landscape and flavors of the Texas Hill Country. Made here, for here — and everyone who wishes they were here.

03
Clean & Crisp

Real carbonation. Real taste. No guilt. FIZI is the soda you reach for when you want to do right by yourself.

What's Inside

Clean ingredients.
No compromises.

We believe you deserve to know exactly what you're drinking — and why every ingredient earns its place in the can.

Sweetener No. 1
Allulose

A rare sugar found naturally in small amounts in figs, raisins, and maple syrup. Allulose tastes just like sugar — clean and sweet with no aftertaste — but contains about 90% fewer calories and has a glycemic index of zero, meaning it won't spike your blood sugar. It's FDA-recognized as safe and excluded from "added sugar" counts on nutrition labels.

Sweetener No. 2
Agave

Derived from the sap of the agave plant — the same plant behind tequila and centuries of traditional Mexican medicine. Agave has a lower glycemic index than regular sugar and contains natural prebiotic fibers that support gut health by feeding the good bacteria in your digestive system. We use it in small amounts for a touch of natural sweetness.

The Good Stuff
Real Fruit Juice

Real juice, doing real work — giving FIZI its bright, honest taste without any artificial help.

Energy Source
Plant-Based Caffeine

Our caffeine comes from natural plant sources — giving you a clean, steady lift without the jitters or crash that come with artificial stimulants. The way energy was always meant to feel.

The Lineup

Start here.

Hill Country Citrus

Bright, sun-kissed citrus with a clean finish. Inspired by the cedar-lined hills and long Texas summers. Sparkling, natural, and built for wherever the day takes you.
